nasb.text: A man will be praised according to his insight, But one of perverse mind will be despised.

esv.text: A man is commended according to his good sense, but one of twisted mind is despised.

cnv.text: 人因著自己的明慧必得稱讚， 但心中乖謬的必被藐視。

ccb.text: 人有智慧受称赞， 心术不正遭唾弃。

csbs.text: 人因自己的明达，将受称赞； 而心里歪曲的人，将受藐视。
